3107480.name: The Pi Game: Infinite Quest
3107480.description:
The Pi Game: Infinite Quest is an exhilarating and intellectually stimulating game that tests your skill and memory with the decimals of Pi. In this game, you click on the correct decimals to continue the sequence and rack up points. With a finite number of lives and a ticking timer, you'll need to stay focused and act swiftly to achieve the highest score possible. As you progress, you can unlock unique one-time abilities that provide hints or aid, but be cautious—using these abilities will decrease your point total.

  • Challenging Gameplay: Test your memory and quick-thinking skills as you navigate through an ever-expanding sequence of Pi’s decimals.

  • Dynamic Scoring System: Earn points based on accuracy and speed. The faster and more precise you are, the higher your score.

  • Limited Lives and Timer: Start with three lives and compete against the clock. Lose all lives or run out of time to end your game.

  • Unlockable Abilities: Discover and utilize special one-time abilities to gain hints or assistance, adding a strategic layer to your gameplay. Note that using these abilities will reduce your score.

  • Engaging Experience: Designed to be both fun and educational, this game provides an entertaining way to challenge your cognitive skills.

The Pi Game: Infinite Quest offers a visually engaging and interactive experience that combines educational elements with high-stakes gameplay. Perfect for players who enjoy mental challenges and quick reflexes, this game provides endless replayability and a chance to improve your memory and speed in a captivating environment.
3107480.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 加泰罗尼亚语, 法语, 意大利语
